testcase.name: test_14_01_budget_correctness_every_forward_step

failure.message: section14_runtime.Section14DiscoveryError: No compatible synthetic input was found for the discovered model. Attempts: shape=(2, 12), dtype=torch.int64: ValueError: inputs must have shape [batch, sequence, input_dim] shape=(2, 12, 16), dtype=torch.float32: ValueError: Expected input_dim=8, received 16 shape=(12, 2), dtype=torch.int64: ValueError: inputs must have shape [batch, sequence, input_dim] shape=(12, 2, 16), dtype=torch.float32: ValueError: Expected input_dim=8, received 16 shape=(2, 12, 8), dtype=torch.float32: ValueError: requested_budget=4 is not in allowed_budgets=(8, 16, 32, 64, 128) shape=(12, 2, 8), dtype=torch.float32: ValueError: requested_budget=4 is not in allowed_budgets=(8, 16, 32, 64, 128) shape=(2, 12, 32), dtype=torch.float32: ValueError: Expected input_dim=8, received 32 shape=(12, 2, 32), dtype=torch.float32: ValueError: Expected input_dim=8, received 32 shape=(2, 12, 64), dtype=torch.float32: ValueError: Expected input_dim=8, received 64 shape=(12, 2, 64), dtype=torch.float32: ValueError: Expected input_dim=8, received 64

testcase.failure:
def test_14_01_budget_correctness_every_forward_step() -> None: budget = 4 model = build_model(seed=2026, budget=budget) model.eval() encourage_writes(model) > x = compatible_input(model, seq_len=12) ^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^
tests/test_section14_required.py:74: _ _ _ _ _ _ _ _ _ _ _ _ _ _ _ _ _ _ _ _ _ _ _ _ _ _ _ _ _ _ _ _ _ _ _ _ _ _ _ _
model = BudgetMemR( (recurrent_cell): GRUCell(8, 16) (key_projection): Linear(in_features=16, out_features=8, bias=False) ...ures=64, bias=True) (1): SiLU() (2): Linear(in_features=64, out_features=1, bias=True) (3): Sigmoid() ) ) seq_len = 12
def compatible_input(model: nn.Module, seq_len: int = 12) -> Tensor: failures: list[str] = [] attempted: set[tuple[tuple[int, ...], torch.dtype]] = set() inferred_dimensions: list[int] = []
def try_input(x: Tensor) -> Tensor | None: key = (tuple(x.shape), x.dtype) if key in attempted: return None attempted.add(key) try: reset_memory(model, require=False) with torch.no_grad(): invoke(model, x, reset=True) return x except Exception as exc: message = f"{type(exc).__name__}: {exc}" failures.append( f"shape={tuple(x.shape)}, dtype={x.dtype}: {message}" ) patterns = ( r"Expected input_dim[=:]\s*(\d+)", r"expected input[_ ]dim[=:]\s*(\d+)", r"input_dim\s+must\s+be\s+(\d+)", r"input_size\s+must\s+be\s+(\d+)", ) for pattern in patterns: match = re.search(pattern, message, flags=re.IGNORECASE) if match: inferred_dimensions.append(int(match.group(1))) return None
for candidate in _candidate_inputs(model, seq_len=seq_len): accepted = try_input(candidate) if accepted is not None: return accepted
dimensions = list(dict.fromkeys([*inferred_dimensions, 8, 16, 32, 64])) for feature_dim in dimensions: for candidate in ( torch.randn(2, seq_len, feature_dim), torch.randn(seq_len, 2, feature_dim), ): accepted = try_input(candidate) if accepted is not None: return accepted
> raise Section14DiscoveryError( "No compatible synthetic input was found for the discovered model. Attempts:\n" + "\n".join(failures) ) E section14_runtime.Section14DiscoveryError: No compatible synthetic input was found for the discovered model. Attempts: E shape=(2, 12), dtype=torch.int64: ValueError: inputs must have shape [batch, sequence, input_dim] E shape=(2, 12, 16), dtype=torch.float32: ValueError: Expected input_dim=8, received 16 E shape=(12, 2), dtype=torch.int64: ValueError: inputs must have shape [batch, sequence, input_dim] E shape=(12, 2, 16), dtype=torch.float32: ValueError: Expected input_dim=8, received 16 E shape=(2, 12, 8), dtype=torch.float32: ValueError: requested_budget=4 is not in allowed_budgets=(8, 16, 32, 64, 128) E shape=(12, 2, 8), dtype=torch.float32: ValueError: requested_budget=4 is not in allowed_budgets=(8, 16, 32, 64, 128) E shape=(2, 12, 32), dtype=torch.float32: ValueError: Expected input_dim=8, received 32 E shape=(12, 2, 32), dtype=torch.float32: ValueError: Expected input_dim=8, received 32 E shape=(2, 12, 64), dtype=torch.float32: ValueError: Expected input_dim=8, received 64 E shape=(12, 2, 64), dtype=torch.float32: ValueError: Expected input_dim=8, received 64
tests/section14_runtime.py:475: Section14DiscoveryError

testcase.failure:
def test_14_02_causality_future_tokens_do_not_change_earlier_steps() -> None: seed = 2026 model_a = build_model(seed=seed, budget=4) model_b = build_model(seed=seed, budget=4) assert state_dict_equal(model_a, model_b)
model_a.eval() model_b.eval() encourage_writes(model_a) encourage_writes(model_b)
> x = compatible_input(model_a, seq_len=12) ^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^

model = BudgetMemR( (recurrent_cell): GRUCell(8, 16) (key_projection): Linear(in_features=16, out_features=8, bias=False) ...ures=64, bias=True) (1): SiLU() (2): Linear(in_features=64, out_features=1, bias=True) (3): Sigmoid() ) ) seq_len = 12
def compatible_input(model: nn.Module, seq_len: int = 12) -> Tensor: failures: list[str] = [] attempted: set[tuple[tuple[int, ...], torch.dtype]] = set() inferred_dimensions: list[int] = []
def try_input(x: Tensor) -> Tensor | None: key = (tuple(x.shape), x.dtype) if key in attempted: return None attempted.add(key) try: reset_memory(model, require=False) with torch.no_grad(): invoke(model, x, reset=True) return x except Exception as exc: message = f"{type(exc).__name__}: {exc}" failures.append( f"shape={tuple(x.shape)}, dtype={x.dtype}: {message}" ) patterns = ( r"Expected input_dim[=:]\s*(\d+)", r"expected input[_ ]dim[=:]\s*(\d+)", r"input_dim\s+must\s+be\s+(\d+)", r"input_size\s+must\s+be\s+(\d+)", ) for pattern in patterns: match = re.search(pattern, message, flags=re.IGNORECASE) if match: inferred_dimensions.append(int(match.group(1))) return None
for candidate in _candidate_inputs(model, seq_len=seq_len): accepted = try_input(candidate) if accepted is not None: return accepted
dimensions = list(dict.fromkeys([*inferred_dimensions, 8, 16, 32, 64])) for feature_dim in dimensions: for candidate in ( torch.randn(2, seq_len, feature_dim), torch.randn(seq_len, 2, feature_dim), ): accepted = try_input(candidate) if accepted is not None: return accepted
> raise Section14DiscoveryError( "No compatible synthetic input was found for the discovered model. Attempts:\n" + "\n".join(failures) ) E section14_runtime.Section14DiscoveryError: No compatible synthetic input was found for the discovered model. Attempts: E shape=(2, 12), dtype=torch.int64: ValueError: inputs must have shape [batch, sequence, input_dim] E shape=(2, 12, 16), dtype=torch.float32: ValueError: Expected input_dim=8, received 16 E shape=(12, 2), dtype=torch.int64: ValueError: inputs must have shape [batch, sequence, input_dim] E shape=(12, 2, 16), dtype=torch.float32: ValueError: Expected input_dim=8, received 16 E shape=(2, 12, 8), dtype=torch.float32: ValueError: requested_budget=4 is not in allowed_budgets=(8, 16, 32, 64, 128) E shape=(12, 2, 8), dtype=torch.float32: ValueError: requested_budget=4 is not in allowed_budgets=(8, 16, 32, 64, 128) E shape=(2, 12, 32), dtype=torch.float32: ValueError: Expected input_dim=8, received 32 E shape=(12, 2, 32), dtype=torch.float32: ValueError: Expected input_dim=8, received 32 E shape=(2, 12, 64), dtype=torch.float32: ValueError: Expected input_dim=8, received 64 E shape=(12, 2, 64), dtype=torch.float32: ValueError: Expected input_dim=8, received 64

def test_14_11_detached_cached_states_are_intentionally_detached() -> None: evidence = cache_graph_policy_evidence() assert evidence["detach_call"], ( "No explicit cached-state detach operation was found in memory/controller source." ) assert evidence["explicit_policy"], ( "Cached-state detachment exists but is not exposed/documented as an intentional policy." )

model = BudgetMemR( (recurrent_cell): GRUCell(8, 16) (key_projection): Linear(in_features=16, out_features=8, bias=False) ...ures=64, bias=True) (1): SiLU() (2): Linear(in_features=64, out_features=1, bias=True) (3): Sigmoid() ) ) seq_len = 10
def compatible_input(model: nn.Module, seq_len: int = 12) -> Tensor: failures: list[str] = [] attempted: set[tuple[tuple[int, ...], torch.dtype]] = set() inferred_dimensions: list[int] = []
def try_input(x: Tensor) -> Tensor | None: key = (tuple(x.shape), x.dtype) if key in attempted: return None attempted.add(key) try: reset_memory(model, require=False) with torch.no_grad(): invoke(model, x, reset=True) return x except Exception as exc: message = f"{type(exc).__name__}: {exc}" failures.append( f"shape={tuple(x.shape)}, dtype={x.dtype}: {message}" ) patterns = ( r"Expected input_dim[=:]\s*(\d+)", r"expected input[_ ]dim[=:]\s*(\d+)", r"input_dim\s+must\s+be\s+(\d+)", r"input_size\s+must\s+be\s+(\d+)", ) for pattern in patterns: match = re.search(pattern, message, flags=re.IGNORECASE) if match: inferred_dimensions.append(int(match.group(1))) return None
for candidate in _candidate_inputs(model, seq_len=seq_len): accepted = try_input(candidate) if accepted is not None: return accepted
dimensions = list(dict.fromkeys([*inferred_dimensions, 8, 16, 32, 64])) for feature_dim in dimensions: for candidate in ( torch.randn(2, seq_len, feature_dim), torch.randn(seq_len, 2, feature_dim), ): accepted = try_input(candidate) if accepted is not None: return accepted
> raise Section14DiscoveryError( "No compatible synthetic input was found for the discovered model. Attempts:\n" + "\n".join(failures) ) E section14_runtime.Section14DiscoveryError: No compatible synthetic input was found for the discovered model. Attempts: E shape=(2, 10), dtype=torch.int64: ValueError: inputs must have shape [batch, sequence, input_dim] E shape=(2, 10, 16), dtype=torch.float32: ValueError: Expected input_dim=8, received 16 E shape=(10, 2), dtype=torch.int64: ValueError: inputs must have shape [batch, sequence, input_dim] E shape=(10, 2, 16), dtype=torch.float32: ValueError: Expected input_dim=8, received 16 E shape=(2, 10, 8), dtype=torch.float32: ValueError: requested_budget=4 is not in allowed_budgets=(8, 16, 32, 64, 128) E shape=(10, 2, 8), dtype=torch.float32: ValueError: requested_budget=4 is not in allowed_budgets=(8, 16, 32, 64, 128) E shape=(2, 10, 32), dtype=torch.float32: ValueError: Expected input_dim=8, received 32 E shape=(10, 2, 32), dtype=torch.float32: ValueError: Expected input_dim=8, received 32 E shape=(2, 10, 64), dtype=torch.float32: ValueError: Expected input_dim=8, received 64 E shape=(10, 2, 64), dtype=torch.float32: ValueError: Expected input_dim=8, received 64
tests/section14_runtime.py:475: Section14DiscoveryError

testcase.name: test_strict_budget_is_never_violated

failure.message: ValueError: write_threshold must be strictly between zero and one

testcase.failure:
def test_strict_budget_is_never_violated() -> None: torch.manual_seed(2026) > model = _model().eval() ^^^^^^^^
tests/models/test_budgetmem_r.py:32: _ _ _ _ _ _ _ _ _ _ _ _ _ _ _ _ _ _ _ _ _ _ _ _ _ _ _ _ _ _ _ _ _ _ _ _ _ _ _ _ tests/models/test_budgetmem_r.py:27: in _model return BudgetMemR(**config) ^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^ _ _ _ _ _ _ _ _ _ _ _ _ _ _ _ _ _ _ _ _ _ _ _ _ _ _ _ _ _ _ _ _ _ _ _ _ _ _ _ _
self = BudgetMemR(), input_dim = 6, hidden_dim = 12, output_dim = 3, key_dim = 8 value_dim = 10, budget_embedding_dim = 16, controller_dim = 64, max_budget = 5 training_budgets = (8, 16, 32, 64, 128), top_k = 4, fusion_mode = 'gated' write_threshold = 0.0, write_temperature = 0.67 allowed_budgets = (1, 2, 3, 4, 5), retrieval_k = 2, backbone = 'gru' fusion = None, detach_memory_writes = False
def __init__( self, *, input_dim: int, hidden_dim: int, output_dim: int, key_dim: int | None = None, value_dim: int | None = None, budget_embedding_dim: int = 16, controller_dim: int = 64, max_budget: int = 128, training_budgets: Sequence[int] = DEFAULT_TRAINING_BUDGETS, top_k: int = 4, fusion_mode: str = "gated", write_threshold: float = 0.5, write_temperature: float = 0.67, allowed_budgets: Sequence[int] | None = None, retrieval_k: int | None = None, backbone: str = "gru", fusion: str | None = None, detach_memory_writes: bool = False, ) -> None: super().__init__()
if input_dim <= 0 or hidden_dim <= 0 or output_dim <= 0: raise ValueError("input_dim, hidden_dim, and output_dim must be positive") if max_budget <= 0: raise ValueError("max_budget must be positive") if not 0.0 < write_threshold < 1.0: > raise ValueError("write_threshold must be strictly between zero and one") E ValueError: write_threshold must be strictly between zero and one
src/budgetmem/models/budgetmem_r.py:66: ValueError
